creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> … this year's 29th anniversary …

To the left of the 25th anniversary badge: 

"… more than thirty years. …"

If the FreeBSD Project is _less than_ thirty years old, then there should be a link out to put the _greater_ age in context. 

Thanks
